# Sprint 1.3 Legacy Garage Integration

**Project:** urban-parking-optimization-system
**Sprint:** Sprint 1. Iot Sensor Deployment
**Objective:** Deploy IoT sensors across 10,000 parking spaces and establish reliable, near real-time visibility into parking availability.

## Description
Integrate legacy garage systems using Python-based OCR pipelines to read analog gauge images captured nightly from CCTV feeds.

## Deliverable
Legacy garage integration design document
